title: Create: Blaze Powder Recipe
description: Adds a balanced and automated recipe for Blaze Powder using Create mod mechanics.
body:
About the Mod

This is a lightweight, standalone mod for both Forge and Fabric, designed for players who want a simple, safe way to automate Blaze Powder production using the Create mod. No more dangerous trips to the Nether to hunt Blazes!

Please check the Files tab to download the correct version (Forge or Fabric) for your modpack.

The Recipe & How It Works A perfectly balanced, fully automatable recipe. You can craft Blaze Powder by mixing 1x Gunpowder, 1x Cinder Flour, and 50mB of Lava in a Basin with a Mechanical Mixer.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02fb33ddb2e7c38ddcca2a42ca7203d436843eab.png)

Fully Automatable Ecosystem Worried about automating the ingredients like Gunpowder or Netherrack (which is needed for Cinder Flour)? Don't be! You can make this entire production line 100% automatable by pairing it with my other lightweight Create mods:

Create: Gunpowder Recipe (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-gunpowder-recipe) - Automate Gunpowder using Sand, Gravel, and Flint.

Create: Netherrack Recipe (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-netherrack-recepie) - Automate the Netherrack needed to crush into Cinder Flour.

Dependencies To use this mod, you must have the following installed:

Create (Forge or Fabric version)

Fabric API (Only if you are using the Fabric version)

Modpacks You are absolutely free to include this mod in any CurseForge modpack!

The Create: Blaze Powder Recipe Team
